title: Executive Order 7882—Establishing the Tybee Migratory Bird Refuge

flags.justification: A narrow, technical land designation for wildlife conservation under specific statutory authority.
A clear, specific designation subject to valid existing rights.
A land-designation action, not a compliance regime against private parties.
No compliance regime is created by this order.
A permanent wildlife refuge designation, not a temporary-authority grant requiring review.

Sec. 2 explicitly subjects the refuge to continuing use by the Department of Commerce (lighthouse purposes) and the War Department (river and harbor improvement), stating wildlife administration 'shall be without interference with any existing or future uses' of either — an unusually explicit dual-agency non-interference clause.
No compliance regime is created by this order.
A narrow, routine application of an established conservation-designation mechanism.
The explicit dual-agency non-interference clause is a genuinely well-designed, conflict-avoiding overlay across three agencies' interests in the same land.
No coverage population or exemption structure is created.

notes: Validation batch (negative). Structural weight: 0/12 = 0.0%. Notable among the wildlife-refuge orders in this batch for its unusually explicit protection of two other agencies' (Commerce and War) existing and future jurisdictional interests in the same land.
